top_signals.title: US Stocks Slide as Oil, Yields Edge Higher; Chip Shares Decline
top_signals.summary: US stocks slid on Monday as oil prices climbed on mixed signals around US-Iran peace talks, and US 30-year yields pushed toward their highest since 2007. Semiconductor stocks traded lower, with sentiment muted and inflation a key concern.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Katayama Signals Care for Bond Market in Compiling Extra Budget
top_signals.summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama indicated she will take into account the bond market as the government considers how to fund new spending to address the adverse impacts of Middle East conflict on the economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
